name: Dinowrestler Capaptera
name_jp: ダイナレスラー・カパプテラ
desc: If your opponent controls more monsters than you do: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Dinowrestler Capaptera" once per turn. If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Dinowrestler" monster: You can activate this effect; the Link Monster that used this card as material gains 1000 ATK until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls more monsters than you do: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Dinowrestler Capaptera" once per turn. If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Dinowrestler" monster: You can activate this effect; the Link Monster that used this card as material gains 1000 ATK until the end of this turn.
eff: If your opponent controls more monsters than you do: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Dinowrestler Capaptera" once per turn. If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material for the Link Summon of a "Dinowrestler" monster: You can activate this effect; the Link Monster that used this card as material gains 1000 ATK until the end of this turn.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Activates if used as Link Material
